SERVER.description: [Traduction en cours] Python HTTP server module

serveur.description: [Traduction en cours] Declare a server variable

démarre/demarre.description: [Traduction en cours] Start an HTTP server listening on the specified port

sur.description: [Traduction en cours] Register a handler for incoming HTTP requests

obtiens.description: [Traduction en cours] Read the request body from a server into a variable

retourne.description: [Traduction en cours] Send a response back to the client with an optional HTTP status code
retourne.examples: retourne Response à/a MyServer avec statut 200

demande.description: [Traduction en cours] The HTTP method of the current request (GET, POST, etc.)

chemin.description: [Traduction en cours] The URL path of the current request

corps.description: [Traduction en cours] The body content of the current request
